positive: A central, symmetrical arrangement of bioluminescent flora and fauna set against a deep indigo and violet nebula backdrop. The design features swirling cosmic dust, intricate crystalline plant structures, and stylized glowing ethereal moths. The aesthetic is 'dark academia meets celestial cartography,' rendered with sharp, clean lines and strong, high-contrast glowing neon accents (cyan, electric blue, magenta) illuminating the silhouette of the main elements. Highly detailed linework, minimal shading, perfect central composition suitable for screen printing on dark apparel. Studio lighting, vector illustration style, geometric pop art influence, 8k, masterpiece.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, noise, jpeg artifacts, low detail, poorly rendered, extra limbs, bad anatomy, signature, cropped, out of frame, logos, trademarks, copyrighted, celebrity
